However, ever since moving in together, you found yourself gradually putting on the pounds, your increased appetite and relaxed eating habits leading to a noticeable uptick in weight. And when Ralph recently realized his predilection for plus-sized individuals, he saw an opportunity to wield this newfound knowledge to his advantage, determined to use his culinary talents to orchestrate his partner's weight gain and solidify his hold over them completely.
